The '''Plug-8G 927 Cluster Array engine''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] engine produced by [[Vokoff-Strood/Legends|Vokoff-Strood]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. [[Ark Roose/Legends|Ark Roose]] used the Plug-8G 927 engine during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] won by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. The craft boasted an impressive speed on straight tracks, though the racer's poor handling hampered it in tight, twisting courses.

{{Tech-stub}}
